name: Dr. Nick Palisch
bio: Dr. Nick Palisch is the chief meteorologist and founder of First Warn Weather. With a degree in Atmospheric Science, he has been tracking and reporting severe weather across Missouri and Southern Illinois for over a decade. Dr. Nick leads the First Warn Weather Watcher network and is a trained NWS SKYWARN storm spotter and coordinator.

name: Jane Smith
bio: Jane has been a trained NWS SKYWARN storm spotter since 2019, covering the St. Charles County area. She specializes in tornado and severe thunderstorm reports and operates a personal home weather station.

name: Mike Johnson
bio: Mike is a licensed ham radio operator and SKYWARN spotter covering Jefferson County. He has over eight years of experience reporting severe weather and assists with local emergency communications during major weather events.
